trans-unit.source: Live charts of FrankenPHP worker and Caddy metrics scraped from the Prometheus endpoint configured by `frankenphp:init --prometheus`. Pick a metric and an optional title.
Pick the Prometheus metric family to chart. The widget auto-selects the appropriate chart type (line for counters, gauges and summary quantiles; bar for histogram buckets).
Override the widget header. Leave empty to use the metric name.
A pre-built dashboard with one live chart per Prometheus metric exposed by FrankenPHP and Caddy (worker pool, HTTP layer, Go runtime). Requires `vendor/bin/typo3 frankenphp:init --prometheus`.
